note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to investigate the targeting accuracy of a clinical ultrasound-guided high-intensity focused ultrasound phased-array system using a phantom and a stick as targets.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A person in a lab coat and gloves prepares a solution by adding 0.3 g of ammonium persulfate to 5 mL of water in a green cup.",
    "The person places the cup into a container filled with water and adjusts settings on a machine.",
    "The machine's settings include pulse duration (400 ms), duty cycle (80%), acoustic power (400 W), and inter-focal spot cooling time (30 s).",
    "The person monitors the machine's operation on a computer screen."
  ],

    "Water"
